items.title: Ship a digestible process-local Runtime Integrity Passport
items.description: Fuse live IPC/game-loop health, experiment rejection posture, remote-AI reservation truth, and bounded WebSocket policy into one admin-only, scope-labeled, SHA-256-digested contract.
items.evidence: RuntimeIntegrityPassport module, admin route, canonical digest and tamper-sensitive tests

items.title: Emit a machine-readable Release Evidence Manifest after every build
items.description: Bind Git revision/dirty state, launch mode, audit exhaustion, and exact transfer budgets into static/release-evidence.json so promotion and agents consume the same provenance.
items.evidence: post-build manifest generator, build wiring, and clean/dirty provenance tests

items.title: Turn complete-all into a machine-enforced Exhaustion Proof gate
items.description: Fail the doctor and closeout whenever the latest audit or innovation sidecar retains a pending unblocked item; emit counts and exact item IDs instead of relying on prose.
items.evidence: audit+innovation exhaustion checker, doctor probe, and pending/deferred fixtures

items.title: Bind every remote-AI answer to a verifiable response receipt
items.description: Extend canonical request evidence through validated provider output, exact model identity, timestamp, and a tamper-evident response digest so cached and fresh answers share one auditable provenance contract.
items.evidence: canonical AI response-receipt builder/verifier, live Worker wiring across oracle/coach/recap/debrief, cache preservation, and tamper tests

items.title: Publish a fail-closed Human + Agent capability reachability contract
items.description: Cross-bind public capability claims to exact routes, client mounts, certificate consumers, policy middleware, and executable source tokens while preserving the honest public-unlaunched runtime posture.
items.evidence: agent-readable capability manifest, source-digested reachability checker, agents.json discovery link, doctor probe, and fail-closed fixtures

items.title: Turn release evidence into a self-verifying provenance DAG
items.description: Chain source, external gates, local surfaces, work exhaustion, transfer budgets, and the final decision into ordered SHA-256 receipts with a single root digest that fails on tamper or forward references.
items.evidence: canonical evidence DAG builder/verifier, release-manifest integration, root receipt, and tamper/ordering tests

items.title: Make the startup brief prove its own arithmetic
items.description: Recompute context utilization and reject numeric SIL forecasts with zero parsed evidence so adjacent source-of-truth values cannot contradict one another behind a polished status tile.
items.evidence: semantic brief validator, contradiction diagnostics, and adversarial context/SIL fixtures

items.title: Bind cross-surface project truth into release provenance
items.description: Fingerprint status identity, generated manifest posture, footer topology, and immutable deployment sources, then make that receipt a first-class parent of the release decision.
items.evidence: canonical project-truth fingerprint, source digests, release-lineage node, and mutation-sensitive tests

items.title: Turn rollback prose into an executable receipt contract
items.description: Require immutable image and staging-evidence digests, dry-run-first promotion, canonical health verification, and a retained rollback receipt so recovery instructions cannot drift from workflow inputs.
items.evidence: digest-addressed operator runbook, 25-check deploy contract gate, and protocol regression execution

items.title: Make externally blocked audit truth exhaustible without becoming invisible
items.description: Teach the complete-all gate that an evidenced cross-repo or authorization corridor is non-actionable locally while retaining its exact status and reason in the generated Genius list.
items.evidence: shared exhaustion taxonomy and externally-blocked regression fixture

items.title: Make local theme evidence self-expiring and claim-boundary aware
items.description: Validate the six-cell desktop/mobile theme matrix, contrast floors, surfaces, freshness, and local-only scope so screenshots cannot silently become stale or masquerade as staging parity.
items.evidence: theme receipt validator, doctor probe, freshness/contrast/claim-boundary fixtures

items.title: Make test parallelism a repository-owned resource contract
items.description: Convert the coverage process storm into a durable ceiling so local, CI, and closeout verification cannot silently multiply workers until the host becomes the failure mode.
items.evidence: four-worker ceilings on default, server, and production coverage commands plus a clean 143-file run

items.title: Make unloaded production code visible even before it earns coverage
items.description: Separate visibility from percentage: enumerate the production TypeScript surface, require the Worker router to appear in the report, and ratchet critical seams from measured floors.
items.evidence: production-inclusive V8 configuration, Worker observed-module invariant, ten measured critical-module floors, and regression fixtures

items.title: Extract a fully testable trust boundary from the router god-object
items.description: Turn the Daily Mastery endpoint into an injected authorization and persistence seam that fails closed, reports operational failure, and can be certified without importing the 4,300-line Worker.
items.evidence: dependency-injected route registrar, Worker composition, authorization/isolation/error tests, and 100% route coverage
